generic.text_en: Based on your answers, you may qualify for plans between $150k–$500k.
generic.text_es: Según sus respuestas, podría calificar para planes entre $150k–$500k.

specific_example.text_en: A healthy 35-year-old non-smoker seeking $250,000 in mortgage protection coverage may pay between $30–$45/month.
specific_example.text_es: Una persona saludable de 35 años que no fuma y busca $250,000 en cobertura de protección hipotecaria puede pagar entre $30–$45/mes.
specific_example.when: After step 4 (tobacco) for non-smoker 30-39 age band

price_teasers.disclaimer: Actual rates depend on health, age, and coverage amount. A licensed agent will provide your exact quote.
price_teasers.disclaimer_es: Las tarifas reales dependen de la salud, edad y monto de cobertura. Un agente licenciado le proporcionará su cotización exacta.

mortgage_protection.definition_en: Mortgage protection insurance ensures your family can stay in their home by paying off the remaining mortgage balance if something happens to you.
mortgage_protection.definition_es: El seguro de protección hipotecaria asegura que su familia pueda permanecer en su hogar al pagar el saldo restante de la hipoteca si algo le sucede.
mortgage_protection.key_benefit: Your family keeps the house — no matter what.
mortgage_protection.key_benefit_es: Su familia conserva la casa — pase lo que pase.

term_life.definition_en: Term life insurance provides a death benefit for a specific period (10, 20, or 30 years) at a fixed monthly premium.
term_life.definition_es: El seguro de vida a término proporciona un beneficio por fallecimiento por un período específico (10, 20 o 30 años) a una prima mensual fija.
term_life.key_benefit: Affordable coverage for the years that matter most.
term_life.key_benefit_es: Cobertura accesible para los años que más importan.

final_expense.definition_en: Final expense insurance (burial insurance) covers funeral costs, medical bills, and other end-of-life expenses so your family isn't burdened.
final_expense.definition_es: El seguro de gastos finales (seguro de entierro) cubre costos funerales, facturas médicas y otros gastos de fin de vida para que su familia no tenga esa carga.
final_expense.key_benefit: Peace of mind — your family won't face unexpected costs.
final_expense.key_benefit_es: Tranquilidad — su familia no enfrentará costos inesperados.

mortgage_protection.tobacco_note: Smoker rates are typically 1.5x higher than non-smoker rates.

ca_compliance.license_note: All agents are licensed by the California Department of Insurance.
ca_compliance.bilingual_requirement: California requires multilingual support to serve diverse communities.
